restaurants.name: Osteria del Borgo
restaurants.short_description: Authentic Tuscan cuisine in a cozy medieval setting, featuring homemade pasta and locally sourced ingredients.

restaurants.name: Le Petit Coq
restaurants.short_description: Traditional French bistro serving classic Lyonnaise specialties with an extensive wine selection from the Rhône Valley.

restaurants.name: Zur Goldenen Gans
restaurants.short_description: Historic Viennese tavern serving traditional schnitzel and apple strudel in an elegant 19th-century atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Taberna El Rincón
restaurants.short_description: Lively tapas bar in the heart of Barrio Santa Cruz, known for jamón ibérico and flamenco performances on weekends.

restaurants.name: The Ivy Chelsea Garden
restaurants.short_description: Sophisticated restaurant with a beautiful garden terrace, offering contemporary European dishes with British influences.
